Items.Title: DevBytes 如何改变我作为开发人员的生活 | How DevBytes Changed My Life as a Developer
Items.Description:
作为一名专业开发人员，我一直明白了解编码领域最新趋势、技术和新闻的重要性。 及时了解信息不仅有助于我们的专业发展，还能确保我们的技能保持相关性，并确保我们能够适应科技行业不断发展的格局。

然而，事实证明，在繁忙的日程安排和不断涌入的信息中找到一种保持最新状态的方法是一项挑战。 也就是说，直到我偶然发现 DevBytes，一款改变游戏规则的应用程序彻底改变了我获取信息的方式。

什么是开发字节？

它专为希望了解最新技术趋势的开发人员、产品经理和工程经理而设计。 您可以从Google Play 商店下载它或将其用作 Chrome 扩展程序。 它还有一个网站，您可以在其中阅读更多相关信息。

当我意识到我需要一种更有效的方式来跟上最新的编码新闻而无需筛选冗长的文章时，我开始了 DevBytes 之旅。 凭借其令人印象深刻的 4.7 星评级和 Play 商店超过 100,000 次下载，DevBytes 似乎是解决我问题的完美解决方案。

为什么我喜欢 DevBytes？

它涵盖了广泛的主题，从高级 JavaScript、Python、Node.js、React、Angular、Go、GitHub、算法、Web3、CLI、CSS、Web 开发工具、FAANG 新闻、机器学习，甚至初创公司到加密货币、区块链和 NFT，适合那些对 Web3.0 世界感兴趣的人。

每条新闻都以 64 个字或更少的字数进行总结，让我能够快速了解​​最相关和最吸引人的新闻。 因此，我能够节省时间和精力，同时了解最新情况并帮助我的职业发展。

但 DevBytes 不仅仅是阅读新闻。 它还为我提供了相关的代码片段，我可以在我最喜欢的 IDE 中复制和执行这些代码片段。 这样，我可以边做边学，了解特定代码的工作原理。

我喜欢 DevBytes 的另一个特点是它为全球的全栈、后端、前端和 Android 开发人员精选的顶级编程工作列表。 这有助于我密切关注市场上的机会并相应地规划我的职业生涯。

这对我特别有用，因为我有兴趣投资加密货币并了解更多有关区块链技术的信息。

它使我很容易掌握科技界的最新发展，而不会影响质量或时间。 凭借其友好的用户界面和可定制的提要，DevBytes 已成为我作为开发人员日常工作中不可或缺的一部分。

此外，DevBytes 让我能够与志同道合的开发人员联系，并从他们的见解和经验中学习，培养社区意识和协作学习。

为什么你应该尝试 DevBytes？

如果您正在寻找一款可以帮助您随时了解信息并发展您的编码员职业的应用程序，我强烈建议您试试 DevBytes。 你不会后悔的！

它将通过其简短明了的新闻摘要、代码片段、职位列表、交易和折扣以及加密货币手表功能，让您了解最新情况、了解情况并从中获得乐趣。 不要错过这个在科技界保持领先地位的绝佳机会。 立即下载 DevBytes，亲眼看看它如何改变您作为开发人员的生活。



原文:

As a professional developer, I’ve always understood the importance of staying up-to-date with the latest trends, technologies, and news in the coding world. Keeping informed not only helps us grow professionally but also ensures that our skills remain relevant and that we can adapt to the ever-evolving landscape of the tech industry.

However, finding a way to stay current amid a busy schedule and the constant influx of information proved to be a challenge. That is, until I stumbled upon DevBytes, a game-changing app that has revolutionized the way I stay informed.

What is DevBytes?

DevBytes is an app that provides coding news in a short and crisp format. It is designed for developers, product managers, and engineering managers who want to stay updated with the latest technology trends. You can download it from the Google Play Store or use it as a Chrome extension. It also has a website where you can read more about it.

My journey with DevBytes began when I realized that I needed a more efficient way to keep up with the latest coding news without having to sift through lengthy articles. With its impressive 4.7-star rating and over 100,000 downloads on the Play Store, DevBytes seemed like the perfect solution to my problem.

Why I Love DevBytes?

DevBytes quickly became my go-to app for staying ahead in the fast-paced world of technology. It covers a wide range of topics, from advanced JavaScript, Python, Node.js, React, Angular, Go, GitHub, algorithms, Web3, CLI, CSS, web development tools, FAANG news, Machine Learning, and even startups, to cryptocurrencies, blockchain, and NFTs for those interested in the world of Web3.0.

What sets DevBytes apart is its ability to aggregate the latest coding and technology news from multiple national and international sources, renowned tech blogs, and social media platforms.

Each piece of news is summarized in 64 words or less, allowing me to quickly get up to speed on the most pertinent and engaging news. As a result, I’ve been able to save time and energy while staying informed and aiding in my professional growth.

But DevBytes is not just about reading news. It also provides me with relevant code snippets that I can copy and execute in my favorite IDE. This way, I can learn by doing and understand how a particular code works.

Another feature that I love about DevBytes is its curated list of top programming jobs for full-stack, backend, frontend, and Android developers from across the globe. This helps me keep an eye on the opportunities available in the market and plan my career accordingly.

DevBytes also offers deals and discounts for platforms like Gumlet, Reply.io, Woodpecker, and many others that can help me save money while accessing premium tools.

DevBytes also has a Crypto Watch feature that lets me stay updated with the current prices and daily changes for all major cryptocurrencies. This is especially useful for me as I’m interested in investing in crypto and learning more about blockchain technology.

How DevBytes Has Transformed My Life?

DevBytes has truly transformed the way I consume coding news. It has made it easy for me to stay on top of the latest developments in the tech world without compromising on quality or time. With its user-friendly interface and customizable feed, DevBytes has become an indispensable part of my daily routine as a developer.

Not only has DevBytes helped me improve my skills as a coder by exposing me to new concepts and technologies that I might not have encountered otherwise, but it has also inspired me to explore new areas of interest and learn new things to enhance my career prospects.

Moreover, DevBytes has allowed me to connect with like-minded developers and learn from their insights and experiences, fostering a sense of community and collaborative learning.

Why You Should Try DevBytes?

If you are looking for an app that can help you stay informed and grow your career as a coder, I highly recommend you give DevBytes a try. You won’t regret it!

DevBytes is the ultimate app for coding news that you need to download right now. It will keep you updated, informed, and entertained with its short and crisp news summaries, code snippets, job listings, deals and discounts, and crypto watch features. DevBytes is the app that every developer deserves.

Don’t miss out on this amazing opportunity to stay ahead in the tech world. Download DevBytes today and see for yourself how it can change your life as a developer.

Items.Title: min-content, max-content, fit-content - 更频繁地使用它们 | min-content, max-content, fit-content - use them more often
Items.Description:
也可以在我的博客上找到

了解 CSS 中可用的各种宽度属性是确保页面外观和行为符合预期的重要部分。 在本文中，我们将探讨min-content 、 max-content和fit-content之间的区别，以及何时使用每个属性。

了解最小内容

此属性将优先于任何其他宽度属性，并将自行调整以适应其中的内容。 例如，如果您有一个设置了min-content div，并且其中的文本以 10 个字符换行，则该 div 将展开以容纳完整的 10 个字符。

何时使用min-content ： min-content最好在你想确保一个元素永远不会小于里面的内容时使用。

了解最大内容

此属性将优先于任何其他宽度属性，并将自行调整以适合其容器。 例如，如果您有一个设置了max-content div，并且其中的文本以 10 个字符换行，则该 div 将缩小以适应完整的 10 个字符。

何时使用max-content ： max-content最好在您要确保元素永远不会大于其 container 时使用。

了解适合内容

此属性将优先于任何其他宽度属性，并将自行调整以适应其内容和容器。 例如，如果您有一个设置了fit-content div，并且其中的文本以 10 个字符换行，则该 div 将展开以适应完整的 10 个字符，但不会大于其容器。

何时使用fit-content ：当您希望确保元素永远不会小于其内容但不大于其 container 时，最好使用fit-content 。

三种宽度属性的比较

当谈到 CSS 中的宽度属性时， min-content 、 max-content和fit-content各有不同的用途和好处。

但是，它可能导致元素大于其容器。

  • 但是，它可能导致元素小于其内容。
  • 但是，此属性没有任何重大缺点。

    • 结论

    总之， min-content 、 max-content和fit-content是 CSS 中的三个宽度属性，每个属性都有自己的用途和好处。 在决定使用哪个属性时，重要的是要考虑项目的设计和期望的结果。 当你想确保一个元素永远不会小于它里面的内容时最好使用min-content -content，而当你想确保一个元素永远不会大于它的容器时最好使用max-content 。 当你想确保一个元素永远不会小于它的内容，但不大于它的容器时，最好使用fit-content 。

    我们希望本文能帮助您了解min-content 、 max-content和fit-content之间的区别以及何时使用它们。 为了进一步阅读，我们建议探索用于响应式设计的其他 CSS 属性和技术。



    原文:

    Also available on my blog

    Understanding the various width properties available in CSS is an important part of ensuring our pages look and behave as they should. In this article, we will explore the differences between min-content, max-content, and fit-content, and when to use each property.

    Understanding min-content

    min-content is a CSS property that defines the width of an element as the minimum width it needs to contain its content. This property will take precedence over any other width property and will adjust itself to fit the content within it. For example, if you had a div with min-content set and the text inside was wrapped at 10 characters, the div would expand to fit the full 10 characters.

    When to use min-content: min-content is best used when you want to ensure that an element will never be smaller than the content inside.

    Understanding max-content

    max-content is the opposite of min-content, as it sets the width of an element to the maximum width it can be before it overflows its container. This property will take precedence over any other width properties and will adjust itself to fit within its container. For example, if you had a div with max-content set and the text inside was wrapped at 10 characters, the div would shrink to fit the full 10 characters.

    When to use max-content: max-content is best used when you want to ensure that an element will never be larger than its container.

    Understanding fit-content

    fit-content is a combination of min-content and max-content, as it sets the width of an element to the minimum width it needs to contain its content, but no larger than the width of its container. This property will take precedence over any other width properties and will adjust itself to fit both its content and its container. For example, if you had a div with fit-content set and the text inside was wrapped at 10 characters, the div would expand to fit the full 10 characters but no larger than its container.

    When to use fit-content: fit-content is best used when you want to ensure that an element will never be smaller than its content, but no larger than its container.

    Comparison of the three width properties

    When it comes to width properties in CSS, min-content, max-content, and fit-content each have different uses and benefits.

    min-content ensures that an element will never be smaller than the content inside it, while max-content ensures that an element will never be larger than its container. fit-content combines these two properties, ensuring that an element will never be smaller than the content inside it, but no larger than the container.

    • min-content guarantees that an element will always fit the content inside it. However, it can lead to elements that are larger than their container.
    • max-content guarantees that an element will never exceed its container. However, it can lead to elements that are smaller than their content.
    • fit-content guarantees that an element will never be smaller than its content nor larger than its container. However, this property does not have any major drawbacks.

    Conclusion

    In conclusion, min-content, max-content, and fit-content are three width properties in CSS that each have their own uses and benefits. min-content ensures that an element will never be smaller than the content inside it, while max-content ensures that an element will never be larger than its container. fit-content combines these two properties, ensuring that an element will never be smaller than the content inside it, but no larger than its container.

    When deciding which property to use, it is important to consider the design of your project and the desired outcome. min-content is best used when you want to ensure that an element will never be smaller than the content inside it, while max-content is best used when you want to ensure that an element will never be larger than its container. fit-content is best used when you want to ensure that an element will never be smaller than its content, but no larger than its container.

    We hope this article has helped you understand the differences between min-content, max-content, and fit-content and when to use each one. For further reading, we recommend exploring additional CSS properties and techniques for responsive design.
